subject: [PATCH v3 2/2] nilfs2: fix 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Posted a patch series to fix build failure on 32-bit ARM due to u64 inode numbers. Replaced division operations with bitwise AND and used the udiv_u64() function.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series fixes a build failure on 32-bit ARM due to the introduction of u64 inode numbers, by replacing division operations with bitwise AND and using the udiv_u64() function. It also adds a compile-time assertion to ensure NILFS_BMAP_GROUP_DIV is a power of two.
